docket_entries.description: PER COURT'S ORDER, INSTRUCTION FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE WAS MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAVELFAST INT'L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SISON, RAFAEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2008 - CONTINUED TO MAY-07-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CHALLENGE TO VENUE DENIED. CONTINUED FOR TRIAL. DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR BY TELEPHONE, IF HE SO REQUESTS. CLERK SHALL PROVIDE DEFENDANT WITH NECESSARY INFORMATION CONCERNING TELEPHONE APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT TODAY IN COURT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS SUBMITTED BY DEFT, FILED. DEFT WILL APPEAR BY TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE AT THE HEARING.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAVELFAST INT'L.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAVELFAST INT'L. AS TO DEFENDANT SISON, RAFAEL
COMMISSIONER'S INSTRUCTION RE CHALLENGE OF VENUE, FILED.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SISON, RAFAEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAVELFAST INT'L.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BARBARA ANSCHER. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT APPEARS BY TELEHONE. EXHIBITS FORM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,573.40 FILED BY TRAVELFAST INT'L. AS TO DEFENDANT SISON, RAFAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPY OF NOTICE RE CHALLENGE OF VENUE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
CORRESPONDENCE TO THE COMMISSIONER FROM DEFENDANT RAFAEL SISON, FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-10-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR APPEARANCE BY TELEPHONE.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BARBARA ANSCHER FILED BY TRAVELFAST INT'L.
